creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dimitry Andric from comment #5)

Remove __BSD_VISIBLE. It must never be defined on the command line, it's an internal-only thing and undefined results flow from it. This will soon be a #error if you do it on the command line.

Either just define _BSD_SOURCE or bump _POSIX_C_SOURCE=202405. _BSD_SOURCE, by default, is POSIX and a bunch of other stuff. And if you don't define it, we act like it's defined.
